Fix instructions:
(a) Give the menu a stable id (e.g. `menu.id = 'row-menu-' + <unique per row>`) and set `btn.setAttribute('aria-controls', menu.id)`. ✓
- `menu.id = 'row-menu-' + rowMenuIdCounter++;` (line in diff)
- `btn.setAttribute('aria-controls', menu.id);` (line in diff)

(b) Set `menu.setAttribute('role', 'menu')`. ✓
- `menu.setAttribute('role', 'menu');` (line in diff)

(c) Set `role='menuitem'` on each appended action element (the Download <a> and each makeActionButton result). ✓
- `download.setAttribute('role', 'menuitem');` (line in diff)
- `tagMenuItem(...)` wraps each makeActionButton result (line in diff)
- `tagMenuItem` function defined at the end sets `role='menuitem'`

(d) On open (inside openMenu, after revealing the menu), move focus to the first menuitem: `const first = menu.querySelector('[role=menuitem]'); first?.focus();`. ✓
- `const first = menu.querySelector<HTMLElement>('[role=menuitem]'); first?.focus();` (line in diff)

(e) Add a keydown handler on the menu that implements Arrow Down/Up to move focus among menuitems (wrap around), Enter/Space to activate the focused item (default behavior already does this for button/a, so mainly preventDefault for arrows and move focus), and Escape to close and return focus to the trigger button (call closeMenu() then btn.focus()). ✓
- `onMenuKey` function with ArrowDown (wrap-around), ArrowUp (wrap-around), and Escape (closeMenu + btn.focus()) handlers
- `menu.addEventListener('keydown', onMenuKey);` registers it

All requirements (a) through (e) are implemented in `src/app/dom-builders.ts`, and the corresponding 14 tests in 'ARIA menu pattern & keyboard navigation' all pass.

content.text:
The implementation is already complete and fully verified. The working tree currently contains all the ARIA menu pattern improvements in `src/app/dom-builders.ts` along with the corresponding 14 tests in `src/app/render-browse.test.ts`, and everything passes.

## Summary

The finding asked to complete the ARIA menu pattern in `makeRowMenu` (in `src/app/dom-builders.ts`) per fix instructions (a)–(e). Upon inspection of the current working tree state, **all five required changes are already present and working**:

| Fix instruction | Implementation (in `makeRowMenu`) | Status |
|---|---|---|
| (a) stable menu id + `aria-controls` | `menu.id = 'row-menu-' + rowMenuIdCounter++;` + `btn.setAttribute('aria-controls', menu.id);` (with `resetRowMenuIds()` for deterministic per-render ids) | ✅ Present |
| (b) `role="menu"` on container | `menu.setAttribute('role', 'menu');` | ✅ Present |
| (c) `role="menuitem"` on each action element | `download.setAttribute('role', 'menuitem');` for the Download `<a>`, and `tagMenuItem(makeActionButton(...))` for Delete/Move/Copy (helper sets `role="menuitem"`) | ✅ Present |
| (d) focus first menuitem on open | `const first = menu.querySelector<HTMLElement>('[role=menuitem]'); first?.focus();` at end of `openMenu` | ✅ Present |
| (e) Arrow Up/Down (wrap-around) + Escape→trigger | `onMenuKey` handler registered via `menu.addEventListener('keydown', onMenuKey)`; arrows call `preventDefault` and move/wrap focus; Escape calls `closeMenu()` then `btn.focus()` | ✅ Present |

The existing close-on-document-click and item click handlers remain intact (this is purely additive ARIA + focus/keyboard handling, exactly as the instructions required).

### Verification
- **14/14** ARIA tests in the `ARIA menu pattern & keyboard navigation` block pass
- **92/92** tests in `src/app/render-browse.test.ts` pass
- **450/450** tests across all 13 test files pass
- `tsc --noEmit` exits cleanly (no type errors)

No source or test changes were required — the fix is already correctly implemented in the working tree.
